_comment: wa-dispatch routing. First ENABLED match wins. Match on chat_jid (exact), chat_name or sender_name (case-insensitive substring). Flip 'enabled' to turn a route on/off without deleting it. cooldown_min batches chatty threads: messages arriving inside the window append to the inbox and the next run picks them all up. 'default': null means unrouted chats (family, friends) are ignored entirely.
